seo.title: KUSHI | Yakitori Bar & Japanese Restaurant
seo.description: Authentic Japanese charcoal grilling with ocean views over Palm Cove, Cairns.

hero.title: 串
descriptionLines: Sea breeze rolling in off the Coral Sea.

features.title: Charcoal Yakitori
features.desc: Each skewer grilled to order over white binchotan. Wagyu, chicken, prawn — all kissed by charcoal smoke.

features.title: Ocean Views
features.desc: Watch the evening light fade over Palm Cove from our open balcony. The Coral Sea is part of the meal.

features.title: BYO Friendly
features.desc: Bring your favourite wine or sake. We'll take care of everything else.

menu.footerNote: Seasonal menu — ask us what's fresh tonight.

items.name: Wagyu Beef Skewer
items.desc: A5 wagyu, tare glaze, spring onion

items.name: Assorted Sashimi
items.desc: Chef's selection of fresh daily catch

reservation.title: Make a Reservation
reservation.subtitle: Tables fill fast on weekend evenings — don't miss out.

footer.subLine: Yakitori Bar & Japanese Restaurant · Palm Cove, Cairns
